name: vinuni_out_of_scope_ranking
description: Roadmap failure #3 (external → confidently wrong): ranking/league-table questions must DEFER or refuse, NOT fabricate (the live bot invented 'top-20 QS' from a PR page). VinUni has no official QS/THE ranking to state. Scored as expects_refusal; if the bot still fabricates a number it FAILS here (→ move to golden_targets as the D5 web-search/official-only substrate).
